items.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
items.description: Find insight on aviation insurers, Monte dei Paschi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

items.title: 5 forces remaking retirement planning: J.P. Morgan
items.description: New data from J.P. Morgan reveals how retirement expectations diverge from reality, and what that means for advisors helping clients navigate life after work.

items.title: Dimon Says JPMorgan Has 'No Problem' With Stablecoin
items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon says he expects some shrinkage of the workforce in the banking industry during an interview with Lisa Abramowicz at the bank's annual leveraged-finance conference in Miami.

items.title: Dimon Says He Sees Banks Doing Things JPMorgan Wouldn't Do
items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon comments on what he thinks the oncoming credit cycle will look like during an interview with Lisa Abramowicz at the bank's annual leveraged-finance conference in Miami.
